description: **Beautifully updated 4 bedroom, 3 level townhome in the desirable Easthill community, offering 1,519 sq.ft. of finished living space plus 807 sq.ft. of outdoor and utility areas. This home features a modern kitchen, renovated bathrooms, fresh interior paint, and brand new vinyl flooring throughout. The open concept main floor provides seamless access to a generous patio, deck, and fully fenced backyard. Upstairs includes three bright bedrooms and a refreshed bathroom with a skylight, while the lower level adds a fourth bedroom, laundry, extra storage, and an unfinished flex area. A covered carport is included, and the home is set in a safe, family friendly neighborhood close to parks, top rated schools, and excellent community amenities. Easy to show.
